use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF POLYNEUROPATHY OF HEREDITARY TRANSTHYRETIN-MEDIATED AMYLOIDOSIS

indications.text:
WAINUA is indicated for the treatment of the polyneuropathy of hereditary transthyretin-mediated
amyloidosis in adults.
